arts.ttl: Real Madrid dealt Thibaut Courtois blow ahead of Champions League derby
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been handed a potentially significant blow just three days before their Champions League round-of-16 second leg away Atlético Madrid, with goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois missing Sunday’s LaLiga game against Rayo Vallecano through injury. Will Courtois play against Atlético Madrid in the Champions League?

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name squad to face Rayo as 2 miss out

arts.ttl: Why Thibaut Courtois was dropped from Real Madrid squad to face Rayo Vallecano
arts.sum: Thibaut Courtois is Real Madrid's undisputed number one goalkeeper and is still regarded as one of the best in the business.

arts.ttl: Man City, Paris Saint-Germain 'to go head-to-head' for £59m Real Madrid midfielder this summer
arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly set an asking price of £59m for Eduardo Camavinga, with Paris Saint-Germain and Manchester City both keen on him.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Rayo Vallecano: La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid must secure all three points against Rayo Vallecano to remain in the La Liga title race.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Rayo Vallecano: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Rayo Vallecano in La Liga on Sunday afternoon. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: What is Real Madrid’s Once de Gala now?

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Arda Guler interest 'emerges' after Carlo Ancelotti comments
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Arda Guler is supposedly attracting interest from Eintracht Frankfurt, who are keeping a watchful eye over his playing situation at the Bernabeu.
